resolution_rule: issue-#9: resolve discordant to HUMAN(judge-1) label iff judge-3(GPT-5.6)==judge-1; else UNRESOLVED

judge_2.role: blind LLM judge (gpt-5.6-sol, codex 0.144.1, effort low)

judge_3.role: tie-break on discordant (gpt-5.6-sol); issue-#9 rule resolves toward the human ONLY where judge-3==human; judge-2 and judge-3 are ONE model family, so judge-3 is a conservative human-confirmation step, NOT independent validation
